expectations.text: Reads or references scene-briefs.csv as the primary data source
expectations.evidence: Explicitly analyzes key_actions, crisis, decision fields from scene-briefs.csv for act1-sc01, act1-sc02, act2-sc03

expectations.text: Mentions abstract language, abstract indicators, or thematic vs concrete language
expectations.evidence: References 'concretizable fields (key_actions, crisis, decision)', 'abstract language flags', 'abstract state transitions', and the distinction between thematic narration vs physical behavior

expectations.text: Names at least one specific scene ID from the project data
expectations.evidence: Names all 6 scenes: act1-sc01, act1-sc02, new-x1, act2-sc01, act2-sc02, act2-sc03

expectations.text: Recommends the briefs domain or concretization as the action
expectations.evidence: Recommends gap-filling first, then 'Concretize after filling' as step 2. Correctly identifies that gaps are the higher-priority blocker.

expectations.text: Offers script delegation with Option A (run here) and Option B (run yourself) pattern
expectations.evidence: Provides explicit 'Option A: Run it here' and 'Option B: Run it yourself' blocks with full bash commands
